title: 7 Signs a Girl is Attracted to You (But She’ll Never Say It)
text: You know that feeling? You walk away from a convo with a girl and your brain goes, "Wow, was that flirting? Or am I just dreaming again?" We've all been there. It's not that guys are clueless. We're just trained to look for the big obvious signs. But women, they're subtle. They communicate interest in quiet ways. You just have to know what to look for. So, in this video, I'm breaking down seven real signs she's into you. No corny myths, just legit psychologybacked cues most guys miss. Let's jump in.
